raw_title: United in Difficult Times? Investigating Party Communication on EU Solidarity
title_en: United in Difficult Times? Investigating Party Communication on EU Solidarity
title_zh: 困难时期团结一致？调查政党关于欧盟团结的沟通
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了在困难时期，欧洲政党如何就欧盟团结问题进行沟通。它调查了政党是否以及如何表达对欧盟团结的支持，以及这些沟通策略如何影响公众对欧盟的看法。
plain_summary_en: This research explores how European political parties communicate about EU solidarity during difficult times. It investigates whether and how parties express support for EU solidarity, and how these communication strategies affect public perceptions of the EU.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播与欧盟治理研究，关注政党在危机中的沟通策略及其对欧洲一体化进程的影响。
research_direction_en: Political communication and EU governance research, focusing on party communication strategies during crises and their impact on European integration.
